description: Fetch the Codex manual, sha256-verify it against the response header, temp-cache it, and emit a heading outline.
rules: read-only fetch — HEAD then GET; never mutates a remote service
verifies the x-content-sha256 response header matches the fetched body before caching
writes the manual + outline to a temp cache dir, and the outline/status report to record_store
usage: Optionally set MANUAL_URL (default https://developers.openai.com/codex/codex-manual.md) and CACHE_DIR (default a temp dir). Output: codex-manual-outline.md.
limitation: Requires node + live network to actually fetch; degrades to an empty artifact when node or the network is absent. Not hermetic — the real fetch cannot run offline.
